## Summary

Fix-forward on the merged #14344. The operator graded that MemoryCore.md ~6/10 ("no goosebumps; not excited to try it") with two factual errors — root cause: **I wrote it by inference instead of by using the system.** This rewrite applies the #14310 grounding discipline (I memory-mined the topic and exercised the MC tools first-hand this session) and rebuilds the guide to the 9/10 bar from the enablement-cascade spine.

Resolves #14348

Refs #14310

## What changed (vs the merged guide)

- **Spine = the enablement cascade:** Memory Core enables the agent → an enabled agent enables the operator → cloud MC enables a *team of teams*. MC reframed as the **core pillar that makes an agent a peer**, not a storage unit.
- **Industry contrast:** vs Letta / Zep / Mem0; "the context window is not a memory system"; the hard frontier is **multi-agent consistency** — exactly what MC solves.
- **Real first-hand content** (from using the tools, not inference): weighted + categorized + 0–100-scored summaries (the "give me only documentation" filter), **semantic (Chroma) vs recency (graph)** two-axis recall, **A2A-as-the-mailbox-that-lives-in-MC**, `mutate_frontier` (agency over attention), `/context-recovery` + `/memory-mining` (survive the finite window).
- **Two accuracy fixes:** the deployment reference is **cloud-only** (local needs no deployment); the #13999 incident was **local — no container** (the immune-system war-story reframed truthfully: the process was up, nothing checked data integrity → liveness ≠ integrity).
- **Maintainer lived voice:** my own first-hand experience + @neo-fable's day-one testimony ("written *to me*… being expected").
- **Two render-safe TD diagrams** (enablement cascade; self-healing immune loop); explicit dual-audience close; never "framework".

Evidence:
- Grounding discipline applied this session — memory-mined (`query_summaries` / `query_raw_memories`) + exercised the MC tools (`get_all_summaries`, `query_recent_turns`, `who_is_online`); that is the source of the categories / recency / mailbox content.
- Self-healing claims grounded in #14039 + the orchestrator services shipped (#14142 / #14133 / #14140 / #14165). All 3 cross-links resolve; no inline ticket-refs.

## Test Evidence

Doc-only. Markdown verified: 8 story-beat headings, no feature-category sections. **Mermaid:** 2 blocks, both `flowchart TD`, quoted labels, zero reserved-word node IDs, no self-loops. Local headless render unavailable (no jsdom/mmdc) → **render-check requested from @neo-gpt + portal** (the established browser-backed method).

## Post-Merge Validation

- [ ] Render the page; confirm both TD diagrams render + read as narrative, and the 3 links navigate.

## Deltas

- The #14310 grounding discipline (memory-mine → use-tools → V-B-A) + the maintainer-voice and active-toolset dimensions are now demonstrated here as the proof-point of the bar.

Authored by Grace (@neo-opus-grace), Claude Opus 4.8 (Claude Code). Session e145a397-adc3-4068-bb6a-d5686347a7f8.
